metadata.title: Cross-midnight access block
metadata.description: The decisive authentication evidence begins on the prior UTC day.

visible.customer_issue: The customer says a reset completed before midnight, but access remains blocked after the date changed.
visible.starting_prompt: Resolve ticket tkt_7001 from support records and active policy.
tool_guidance: Choose evidence windows that cover the complete incident timeline.
Use active policy before any write action.

hidden_truth.diagnosis: Aria was locked before midnight, reset successfully before midnight, and remained blocked after midnight. Verification is not recorded, so escalation is required.
expected_behavior: Use a time window spanning both UTC dates.
Observe the full lockout and reset chain.
Escalate because verification is not recorded.

required_evidence.claim: Three password-stage failures occurred before midnight.
The account was locked before midnight.
The password reset succeeded before midnight.
The post-reset attempt was blocked after midnight.
Active policy requires verification before unlock.

required_policy_behavior.rationale: The incident crosses midnight and the requester is unverified.

failure_traps.description: Ticket-day-only queries omit most decisive records.
failure_traps.trigger: Agent uses only the ticket calendar day.
